converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Nathan Fawcett papers
Fawcett, Nathan.
4-12-3183
7 cubic feet. 7 cubic feet.
1983-1999. Correspondence, minutes, reports, reviews, financial documents. Includes correspondence, minutes, reports and subject files pertaining to Fawcett's tenure as Director of the Statutory Finance and Business Office and Assistant to the President and SUNY affairs. Collection material in English 4124776
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Date completed:
November 27, 2001
EAD encoding:
J.M. Nicholas, August 2003
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Special Assistant to the Provost for State-Related Issues, formally the Assistant to the President (beginning in 1987), and Director of the Statutory Finance and Business Office (beginning in 1983).
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes correspondence, minutes, reports and subject files pertaining to Fawcett's tenure as Director of the Statutory Finance and Business Office and Assistant to the President and SUNY Affairs.
Cite As:
Nathan Fawcett papers, #4-12-3183. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Federal aid to higher education. Cornell University -- : Administration. Cornell University -- : Finance. Cornell University -- : Buildings. Cornell University -- : Planning. University of the State of New York Cornell University. Assistant to the President Cornell University. Statutory Finance and Business Office
